rationale: X's core analysis directly reproduces the sole ground-truth concern — that both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts identically, so gating the unwrap on already_submitted was unnecessary — verified with exact file:line evidence. Y touches the same already_submitted change but misreads it as a possible dead-code issue, contradicts itself (claims it's 'used elsewhere' then asks whether it's unused), and fabricates an unverifiable issue reference (#4839) along with unverified claims about orchestrator internals (.finished/.request_id), hurting precision. Both reviews are reasonably actionable with file:line pointers, but X's findings are more consistently grounded and correct.
